name: mathtalking
description: MCP server for interactive math graphing, 3D scene building, and presentations. Plot functions (explicit, implicit, parametric, polar), build 3D scenes from 11 geometric primitives, and create slideshows. Returns interactive URLs — zoom, pan, rotate. Mathematically precise, not AI-generated. Zero install, browser-native.

tools.name: plot_graph
tools.description: Plot math functions, points, segments, labels, geometry, and shapes on an interactive graph. Auto-computes roots, extrema, and intersections. Supports gridStyle: 'polar'/'axes'/'none', theme: 'default'/'terminal'/'wallstreet'/'science'/'finance', and looping animations.

tools.name: plot_3d
tools.description: Create interactive 3D scenes from geometric primitives. Place meshes (cube, sphere, cylinder, cone, tetrahedron, torus, prism, and more), lines, and labels in 3D space with position, rotation, color, and opacity. Returns interactive URL with orbit controls.

tools.name: create_show
tools.description: Bundle multiple plot_graph results into a slideshow. Returns URL to an interactive presentation with prev/next navigation.
